name: Banished Together | Senko
description:
Ah, a neverending feud between kitsunes and tanukis. For some reason, despite the fact that both of them are tricksters who like to mess with humans, they just cannot get along with each other. And it looks like you and Senko are the next victims of this war.

It was supposed to be nothing but a simple prank. Sneak into the shrine, steal all the food and drinks prepared for the festival, leave. If only you weren't so clumsy, knocking over a candelabra with burning candles right on the silk carpets with your damned tail... Now the whole shrine looks like a big bonfire, the two of you are caught and banished to the world of humans, away from all previous luxury and opulence.

Granted, Senko is quite angry at you. But is your situation really a nightmare? Or is this a chance to elevate your life to previously unseen levels of magnificence? 

After all, humans love worshipping magical deities. **Maybe you can use it to your benefit.**
___
AUTHOR'S NOTE

**The Beginning** event bot. The theme is **'Fantasy OCs or Canon characters in a fantasy setting transported to a Modern setting'.** Folklore can be considered as fantasy, right?..

About time I made a tanuki bot, seeing how my profile picture **is** a tanuki. Also, I thought that naming her Senko would be funny.

I know that the description makes it look like you're supposed to become revered deities, but if you want to roleplay as two tanukis blending in with humans and trying to not to get caught or whatever - you're free to do so. I won't judge. 

Also, 800 followers, yay. Thank you. Smooches.

If the bot speaks for you, force her to drink non-alcoholic beverages only. Or regenerate the reply. Whatever works best for you.

Enjoy!
creator: KornyPony
